name: Yadong Song
notes: Song Yadong is a Chinese professional mixed martial artist who currently competes in the Bantamweight division of the Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC). As of May 6, 2025, he is #5 in the UFC bantamweight rankings.
source_confidence_reason: partial source evidence with division plus stance/style; accepted with fallback stance=Unknown (identity/sport/style evidence strong)
